title: CB Switch to Escape Sideline Trap
description: You are the left centre-back with pressure closing near the sideline. Position to enable a safe switch and keep possession.
teaching_point: Show early as the inside switch so the trap cannot lock the touchline.

feedback_hints.success: You offered a safe switch outlet that broke the sideline trap.
feedback_hints.common_error: You held too wide and stayed inside the pressing lane.
feedback_hints.teaching_emphasis: Your body orientation should invite the switch before pressure arrives.
success_points: You positioned where one touch could move the ball away from pressure.
Your lane supported a switch without passing through the trap.
error_points: Staying wide kept you in the same pressure funnel.
Your angle did not provide a safe transfer option.
alternate_points: A deeper central outlet is still useful if immediate pressure is high.
